_note: Factory self-host wiring (NOT a user `adp init` install). Read/Write/Edit/Agent = artifact mgmt + orchestrator spawns step-runner without prompt; acceptEdits auto-approves writes. Bash allow-list scoped to repo node tools (det spine tools/{io,det}/*.mjs, economy-lint, selftests, bin/) so the self-host loop + verify don't prompt per call; any other shell still asks. Canonical surface mirrors adapters/claude/settings.json but engine is in-place at repo root (no .claude/adp/ copy) + Bash scoped for the live spine.
